svg.title: Lexicon Compile Service — full system architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end request pipeline: HTTP client sends JSON or CSV, passes through GzipRequestFilter, LexiconCompileController routes to LexiconCompileService or CsvCompileService, each term is translated by TermSyntaxTranslator and validated by HyperscanCompiler, and a CompileResponse is returned compressed as GZIP JSON.

g.text: preprocess · recursive-descent parse · emit PCRE pattern + hsFlags
JSON · GZIP compressed · PASS / FAILED per term

svg.text: JSON response (Content-Encoding: gzip) returned to client
